appliedUpdates.description: Documented seeded-runtime relay update limitation and the required DEV hook (`__iglooTestUpdateRelays`) in .factory/library/architecture.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align feature-assignment guidance with skill scopes: avoid assigning runtime-worker to pure settings persistence / migration fixes; route those to ui-screen-worker unless runtime protocol wiring is central.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix-m5-idb-migration follow-up reviews flagged runtime-worker assignment conflicting with runtime-worker scope text.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten procedure-compliance rules so workers must record deviations when skipping required checks (agent-browser and/or demo-gallery Playwright) even for non-UI or data-wiring fixes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple m5 fix reviews observed `followedProcedure: true` despite omitted skill-listed verification steps.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve policy mismatch between mission-level 'agent-browser mandatory for UI validation' and skill-level skip allowances; define precedence and acceptable skip cases explicitly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-m5-replace-share-cta-guardnav review noted contradictory guidance between mission AGENTS.md and ui-screen-worker SKILL.md.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated variants of the same procedure-compliance mismatch across multiple fix reviews.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate: consolidated under one systemic skills guidance recommendation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated variants of runtime-worker skill-scope mismatch for storage-oriented fixes.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate: consolidated under one systemic skill-assignment recommendation.
